title: 3 Legged Thing Phil Universal Smartphone Holder – Tripod Mount Clamp for Phones 58–90mm – Rotates Portrait to Landscape – Ideal for Vlogging, Photography, Content Creation (MOSS GREEN)
features: Universal Fit for Most Smartphones Securely holds phones from 58mm to 90mm wide – compatible with iPhones, Samsung Galaxy, Google Pixel and more. Ideal for mobile creators and professionals.
Portrait to Landscape Rotation Quickly rotate your phone from portrait to landscape with the easy-turn locking mechanism – perfect for TikTok, Instagram Reels, Zoom calls, and YouTube videos.
Professional-Grade Tripod Mount Clamp Attaches to any standard tripod or rig using 1/4"-20 thread. Built for stability in photography, videography, and streaming setups.
Durable and Lightweight Design Made with premium materials for strength and portability – a reliable tool for studio use or travel shooting kits.
Perfect for Creators, Streamers & Photographers Whether filming a vlog, capturing stills, or livestreaming, Phil gives you stable, hands-free phone mounting with pro-level control.
description: Product Description 3 LEGGED THING PHIL PHONE HOLDER A robust and versatile smartphone holder and mount that works with Arca-Swiss compatible tripods, 3LT’s Camera Desk Mount System, Pivot Magic Arms, and a range of other accessories. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products. The video shows the product being unpacked. Video Player is loading. Click to play video Play Mute Current Time  0:00 / Duration  0:42 Loaded : 14.30% 0:00 Stream Type  LIVE Seek to live, currently behind live LIVE Remaining Time  - 0:42   1x Playback Rate Chapters Chapters Descriptions descriptions off , selected Captions Captions off , selected English (Automated) Audio Track default , selected Fullscreen This is a modal window. Introducing Phil Merchant video Universal Phil fits a range of different phone widths from 58-90mm. Easy to Use The wing knob opens and locks the extending clamp into place, whilst the knurled ring releases and locks the portrait to landscape rotation function. Accessories Phil features a cold-shoe mount at either end of the clamp, and one 3/8”-16 accessory thread with ¼”-20 adapter in the back Four Colourways Available in four colourways – Darkness (matte black), Lava (copper/black), Black & Moss, Black & Blue. PHIL Max Height 9.7 cm / 3.8 " Max Width 8.4 - 12 cm / 3.3 - 4.7" Weight 127 g / 4.5 oz Mount 1/4"-20 & 3/8"-16 Clamp Size 6.5 - 9 cm / 2.6 - 3.5 "
